title: Epipactis helleborine lusus interrupta

The classification of Epipactis helleborine lusus interrupta places it within the family Orchidaceae. This orchid is native to Europe and Asia, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other species within the Orchidaceae family. Epipactis helleborine lusus interrupta is often considered a distinct form of Epipactis helleborine, with some characteristics that set it apart from the parent species.
